zh.lifeSummary: 當William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir於1160年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易時，他的父親William de Albini41歲，母親Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir27歲。他與Margaret d'Umfraville在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1236年5月1日在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾武分頓享年76歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir于1160年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易时，他的父亲William de Albini41岁，母亲Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir27岁。他与Margaret d'Umfraville在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1236年5月1日在英国英格兰林可爾史爾武分頓享年76岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維蒙達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir was born in 1160, in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, his father, William de Albini, was 41 and his mother, Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, was 27. He married Margaret d'Umfraville in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 1 May 1236, in Uffington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir est né en 1160, à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, William de Albini, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Margaret d'Umfraville à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 mai 1236, à Uffington, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Wymondham, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir 1160 in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Albini 41 und seine Mutter Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir 27. Er hat in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret d'Umfraville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. Mai 1236 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Uffington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wymondham, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir è nato il nel 1160 nel Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, William de Albini, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Margaret d'Umfraville nel Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 maggio 1236, nel Uffington, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Wymondham, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoirが1160年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルで生まれた時，父William de Albiniは41歳，母Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoirは27歳であった。イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルでMargaret d'Umfravilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1236年5月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウフィントンで76歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウイモンドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir(이)가 1160년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Albini(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir(은)는 27세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 Margaret d'Umfraville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1236년 5월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 핀그턴에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 윈이몽함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir nasceu em 1160, em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Albini, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret d'Umfraville em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de maio de 1236, em Uffington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir родился в 1160 г. в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Albini было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret d'Umfraville в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 мая 1236 г. в местности уффингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности вимондхам, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir nació en 1160, en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Albini, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Maud DeClare Countess of Belvoir, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Margaret d'Umfraville en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de mayo de 1236, en Uffington, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Wymondham, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
